name: agent-workflow
description: Tool-agnostic AI delivery workflow with DSL gates, executable plans, atomic tasks, and verification.

interface.shortDescription: Reference to verified AI delivery workflow.
interface.longDescription: Use Reference -> reviewed DSL -> executable Plan -> confirmed AT-T tasks -> verification to keep AI coding work scoped, reviewable, and tool-agnostic.
defaultPrompt: Set up agent-workflow in this repo.
Create a DSL and executable plan.
